Markéta Procházková
Aspiring Data Analyst — former Registered Nurse
marketa.prochazkova@example.cz · +420 731 444 980 · linkedin.com/in/marketapro-fixture
Životopis — synthetic fixture, not a real person

Profil
Registered nurse of nine years transitioning into healthcare data analysis.
Completed a part-time data analytics bootcamp in 2025 and now looking for a
junior analyst role where clinical domain knowledge is an asset.

Vzdělání a rekvalifikace

Data Analytics Bootcamp — Czechitas, Praha (part-time)
Leden 2025 – Červen 2025.
Capstone: built a dashboard tracking ward occupancy from anonymized admission
exports using Python pandas and Tableau.

Bc. in General Nursing — 2. lékařská fakulta, Univerzita Karlova, Praha
2011 – 2014.

Pracovní zkušenosti

Staniční sestra (Ward Nurse) — Nemocnice Pod Lipami, Praha
Srpen 2014 – present
Coordinates shift scheduling for a 28-bed internal medicine ward and owns the
weekly handover reporting; introduced a spreadsheet-based medication audit that
cut documentation errors across the team.
Mentoruje nové sestry a vede zácvik na nemocniční informační systém.

Dovednosti
Python (pandas, beginner), SQL (beginner), Tableau, Excel, clinical data entry,
shift coordination, patient documentation, stakeholder communication.

Jazyky
Čeština rodilá, angličtina B2.
